amazon_product_details_section.Manufacturer\n: ‎ Y Not Natural Aust Pty Ltd

features: Bare Youthful Skin: Revive your youthful radiance with Jillaroo Body and Facial Moisturiser for women and men. Our moisturising cream is a multitasking miracle worker, targeting fine lines, dark spots, and other visible signs of skin maturity on your face, hands, and more!

Your Key to Ageless Beauty: Thanks to the goodness of kakadu plum extract, our face cream is bursting with vitamin C! This superfruit protects the skin’s moisture barrier, leaving it firmer and brighter.

Kind Ingredients, Diverse Usage: Pamper yourself with our face cream for mature skin, enriched with a blend of Beeswax, Jojoba Seed Oil, Aloe Vera, Vitamins A, C, and E, amino acids, minerals, and antioxidants. A versatile powerhouse, this day cream also works wonders on rough elbows, knees, and heels. It nourishes hands and cuticles, too.

Light and Easy on Your Skin: Whether you have young, mature, normal, delicate, or dry skin, this face cream for women and men is your go-to. With just a small amount twice daily, nourish your skin for a radiant, youthful glow.

A Gift of Beauty from the Outback: At Y-Not Natural, we're a CPNP-registered brand on a mission to promote clean, holistic wellness through the gifts of the Outback. Our products offer genuine care and purity, bringing the unspoiled beauty of nature to you.
description: Product Description RESULTS YOU CAN SEE Our anti wrinkle face cream lightens the look of wrinkles & fine lines while revitalising your skin by softening rough areas & preventing flakiness. It's the all-in-one solution for a rejuvenated, youthful appearance MADE WITH KAKADU PLUM EXTRACT Improve your skin with Jillaroo Face Moisturiser, infused with natural Kakadu Plum extract. This Australian superfruit is a rich source of Vitamin C, providing your skin with an unparalleled boost in radiance, ensuring you always put your freshest face forward. INSPIRED BY AUSTRALIAN COWGIRLS Harness the resilience of Jillaroos in every application, & let your skin mirror the beauty, tenacity, & timeless charm of the outback. Just like these women, our face cream stands tough against time's challenges, empowering you to defy skin-maturity. NATURAL FORMULATIONS At Y-Not Natural, we firmly believe that nature holds the key to your well-being. That’s why we craft formulations that provide you with clean, reliable, & highly effective skincare solutions.
